items.title: [Boing Boing] Florida sues OpenAI over ChatGPT's alleged body count
items.content_html:
Florida has become the first state to sue OpenAI and Sam Altman over alleged harms from ChatGPT.

The lawsuit, filed by Attorney General James Uthmeier, accuses OpenAI of rushing unsafe products into the world, marketing ChatGPT as safe and reliable, and ignoring warnings about how the chatbot could affect children, vulnerable users, and people planning violence. — Read the rest

The post Florida sues OpenAI over ChatGPT's alleged body count appeared first on Boing Boing.
